address.address: Near Kali Nadi Pul, Near Siyana bus Stand India

pos_sentences.text: Focus and Holistic Development. College offer various workshop.
pos_sentences.name: Naveen

pos_sentences.text: college is very good There are teachers who teach well in the college. There are also fans in the college who are open all the time.
pos_sentences.name: Nishant Kumar

pos_sentences.text: Cold water is also available in the college. There is facility of cold water on every floor. The college is very clean.
pos_sentences.name: Nishant Kumar

pos_sentences.text: The time in the college remains clean because the toilets are also clean. There is a very big garden in the college which everyone likes very much.
pos_sentences.name: Nishant Kumar

pos_sentences.text: The college offer many activities to participate and remove hesitation.
pos_sentences.name: Tarun kumar kaushik

pos_sentences.text: in computers labs everytime provide AC faculty
pos_sentences.name: Fardeen malik

neg_sentences.text: High fees with limited financial Aid. Fees structure quite hight .
neg_sentences.name: Naveen

neg_sentences.text: Lack of campus safety and security. Rigid and Outdated Curriculum.
neg_sentences.name: Naveen

neg_sentences.text: There is a wrong thing in the college, there is no entry in the college after 10 pm.
neg_sentences.name: Nishant Kumar

neg_sentences.text: Clerks management is good many times they refuses our request for documents.
neg_sentences.name: Tarun kumar kaushik

neg_sentences.text: There is a dress in the college which has to be fully worn and without it there is no entry, they also remove it.
neg_sentences.name: Nishant Kumar

neg_sentences.text: The college has no canteen. Many times we have no food to eat that's why college provide canteen facility.
neg_sentences.name: Tarun kumar kaushik
